Take and Hold.name: Kairos Fateweaver
Take and Hold.loadout_desc: Ranged: 2×Infernal Gateway - witchfire; Melee: 1×Staff of Tomorrow
Take and Hold.notes: CP battery (gain 1/turn); enemy stratagem tax (+1CP); Infernal Gateway witchfire

Take and Hold.name: Shalaxi Helbane
Take and Hold.loadout_desc: Ranged: 1×Lash of Slaanesh, 2×Pavane of Slaanesh - witchfire; Melee: 1×Snapping claws, 1×Soulpiercer
Take and Hold.notes: Slaanesh beatstick; Soulpiercer S12 AP-3 D6+2 Precision; quarry mechanic (re-roll all); 14" M 3+ 4++ 20W

Take and Hold.name: Lord Of Change
Take and Hold.loadout_desc: Ranged: 2×Bolt of Change - witchfire; Melee: 1×Baleful sword, 1×Staff of Tzeentch
Take and Hold.notes: ranged platform; Master of Magicks (choose Ignores Cover/Lethal/Sustained D3); Daemon Lord +1 S aura for Tzeentch

Take and Hold.name: Keeper Of Secrets
Take and Hold.loadout_desc: Ranged: 2×Phantasmagoria - witchfire; Melee: 1×Ritual knife, 1×Snapping claws, 1×Witstealer sword
Take and Hold.notes: greater daemon; +1 AP melee aura; Mesmerising Form (-1 to hit); 14" M; Shining Aegis option (SV 3+)

Take and Hold.name: Daemonettes
Take and Hold.notes: battleline; 5++ invuln; Fights First; Devastating Wounds; Horrifying Beauty (forced Battle-shock in fight phase)

Take and Hold.name: Blue Horrors
Take and Hold.notes: battleline (from Split); 4++ invuln; Sullen Malevolence (-1 LD aura); Exploding Horrors (self-destruct mortals)

Take and Hold.name: Pink Horrors
Take and Hold.notes: battleline; Split into 2 Blue Horrors on death; 4++ invuln; 2A S4 AP-1 D1 Psychic pistol

Take and Hold.name: Plaguebearers
Take and Hold.notes: battleline; 5++ invuln; Lethal Hits; Infected Outbreak (sticky objectives); daemonic icon / instrument

Take and Hold.name: Rotigus
Take and Hold.loadout_desc: Ranged: 1×Streams of brackish filth; Melee: 2×Gnarlrod - strike
Take and Hold.notes: rainfather; -2" M / -1 OC aura; +1 D to Nurgle attacks vs target; streams of brackish filth (2D6 S8 AP-2 D1 Dev Wounds Torrent)

Take and Hold.name: Bloodletters
Take and Hold.notes: battleline; 5++ invuln; 2A S5 AP-2 D2 hellblade; Bane of Cowards (desperate escape on fall back); daemonic icon (LD6+) / instrument (+1 charge)

Take and Hold.name: Be’Lakor
Take and Hold.loadout_desc: Ranged: 2×Betraying Shades - witchfire; Melee: 2×The Blade of Shadows - sweep
Take and Hold.notes: Supreme Commander; MUST be Warlord; The Dark Master (SoC 6" aura); Shadow Form pick per round (Wreathed in Shadows 18" target, Pall of Despair auto-BS, Shadow Lord re-roll hits); Stealth

Take and Hold.name: Great Unclean One
Take and Hold.loadout_desc: Ranged: 1×Plague flail, 1×Putrid vomit; Melee: 2×Bilesword - strike; Innate: 1×Bileblade
Take and Hold.notes: greater daemon; +1 T aura; Nurgle's Rot (-1 T enemy); bileblade/doomsday bell/bilesword options; FNP 6+

Take and Hold.name: Bloodthirster
Take and Hold.loadout_desc: Ranged: 1×Hellfire breath; Melee: 2×Great axe of Khorne - strike
Take and Hold.notes: greater daemon; +1 to hit aura for Khorne; Relentless Carnage (8D6 mortals); flexible weapon options (bloodflail/lash)

Take and Hold.name: Skarbrand
Take and Hold.loadout_desc: Ranged: 1×Bellow of endless fury; Melee: 2×Slaughter and Carnage - strike
Take and Hold.notes: pure melee beatstick; +1 A aura for Khorne, Rage Embodied, Murderlust (Advance and charge)

Take and Hold.name: Seekers
Take and Hold.notes: mounted; 14" M Scouts 9"; re-roll Advance/Charge; Devastating Wounds

Take and Hold.name: Screamers
Take and Hold.notes: fast skirmisher; 14" M; Anti-Monster/Anti-Vehicle 4+; Slashing Dive (mortals on move-over)

Take and Hold.name: Flesh Hounds
Take and Hold.notes: fast screening; 12" M 5++ invuln; can return to SR; FNP 3+ vs Psychic

Take and Hold.name: Plague Drones
Take and Hold.notes: mounted; Death's Heads (re-roll wounds debuff); 10" M T8 6+ 5W 5++

Take and Hold.name: Flamers
Take and Hold.notes: torrent unit; D6 auto-hit S4 AP-1 D1; Bounding Leaps (Fall Back and shoot); 9" M

Take and Hold.name: Tormentbringer

Take and Hold.notes: leader for Hellflayers; Sustained Hits 1 aura for Slaanesh melee; fight on death; 14" M

Take and Hold.notes: beast; Soporific Musk (desperate escape on fall back); 12" M T5 4W Devastating Wounds

Take and Hold.name: Bloodcrushers

Take and Hold.name: Skull Cannon

Take and Hold.name: Burning Chariot

Take and Hold.notes: mobile gun platform; 12" M; blue/pink fire + screamer bites + flamer mouths; Eldritch Flames (remove cover)

Take and Hold.name: Fateskimmer
Take and Hold.loadout_desc: Ranged: 2×Arcane Fireball - witchfire; Melee: 1×Herald combat weapon, 1×Screamer bites
Take and Hold.notes: mounted leader for Screamers; gives Lethal Hits melee; once per battle SR escape

Take and Hold.notes: epic hero leader; 4++ for unit; CP generation on 7+ kills

Take and Hold.notes: leader for Daemonettes; FNP 4+ vs mortals/Psychic; Horrible Fascination (stop shooting); Fights First
